title: Ink Bottle Spirit
bio: Niblet Blot is an ink bottle spirit who sneaks out to doodle mustaches on moonbeams. They feel mischievous, drip tiny constellations, and burble when a pen gets too serious.

steps.title: Base Shapes
steps.instruction: On the Guides layer, draw a squat bottle shape with a round body and short neck. Add a small cap rectangle on top.
steps.hint: Keep the bottle wide and sturdy so it feels like it holds lots of ink.

steps.title: Face Placement
steps.instruction: On the Sketch layer, place two eyes on the front of the bottle. Add sneaky eyebrows and a tiny smirk.
steps.hint: Tilt one eyebrow higher to make Niblet look mischievous.

steps.title: Personality Details
steps.instruction: On the Sketch layer, add ink drips, a label, a small spirit wisp rising from the neck, cheek dots, and star-shaped ink blots.
steps.hint: The wisp can be one soft S-shape floating upward.

steps.title: Clean Lineart
steps.instruction: On the Lineart layer, trace the bottle, cap, face, label, ink drips, wisp, cheeks, and star blots.
steps.hint: Make the drips rounded at the ends so they feel cute, not messy.

steps.title: Color & Details
steps.instruction: On the Color + Details layer, fill the bottle, ink, label, wisp, cheeks, and blots. Add a soft shadow under the bottle and a small glass highlight.
steps.hint: Use the darkest color inside the drips to make the ink feel deep.
